underlying_goal: Install and configure useful MCP servers on the Hetzner Ubuntu server to enhance Claude's capabilities based on the user's actual usage patterns
friction_detail: Claude initially tried docker/mcp-toolkit (not public, requires Docker Desktop) and edited settings.json directly before discovering claude mcp add was the correct method.
brief_summary: User asked for MCP recommendations and installation; Claude successfully installed and connected four MCPs (docker, homeassistant, github, context7) after working through several configuration obstacles.
